title: chloraea chrysantha
intro: Chloraea chrysantha, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Chloraea chrysantha include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
